AddressEmptyCode(address).details: There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract).

ERC1967InvalidImplementation(address).details: The `implementation` of the proxy is invalid.

ERC1967NonPayable().details: An upgrade function sees `msg.value > 0` that may be lost.

FailedCall().details: A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted.

UUPSUnauthorizedCallContext().details: The call is from an unauthorized context.

UUPSUnsupportedProxiableUUID(bytes32).details: The storage `slot` is unsupported as a UUID.

params.allowFailureMap: Bitmask of actions allowed to fail
params.callId: Unique identifier for this execution batch
params.failureMap: Bitmask of actions that actually failed

Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

Upgraded(address).details: Emitted when the implementation is upgraded.

execute(bytes32,(address,uint256,bytes)[.details: Only callable by addresses with EXECUTE_PERMISSION on the DAO.

params.actions: Array of actions to execute sequentially
params.allowFailureMap: Bitmask where bit i = 1 means action[i] is allowed to fail
params.callId: A unique identifier for this batch (e.g. proposal ID)

returns.failureMap: Bitmask of actions that failed (subset of allowFailureMap)
returns.results: Array of return data from each action

params.where: The contract address where the permission applies

returns._0: True if the address has the permission

params.initialOwner: Address that receives ROOT_PERMISSION and UPGRADE_PERMISSION

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

ETHDeposited(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when ETH is deposited into the DAO

Executed(bytes32,address,(address,uint25.notice: Emitted when a set of actions is executed

hasPermission(address,address,bytes32).notice: Check if an address has a specific permission

initialize(address,address).notice: Initialize the DAO (replaces constructor for proxy deployments)

version().notice: Returns the implementation version (useful for verifying upgrades)

userdoc.notice: UUPS-upgradeable core DAO contract. Supports treasury management, batched action execution, role-based permissions, and contract upgrades via UUPS proxy pattern.
